name: rad-agentic-company-builder
description: Claude Code workspace scaffolding (folder hierarchies, CLAUDE.md context files, hook configs, MCP integrations, six-role engineering agents) plus opt-in business-function agents (billing, bookkeeping, support-tier1, recruiting, compliance, CRM, contracts, analytics, marketing-email, web-CMS, social-drafts) where verified write-capable MCPs exist. Ships Python validators that catch fictional hook events, hardcoded secrets, and structural gaps. Honest about what AI agents can and cannot do in 2026.
